architecture.content: A[Front-End Kiosk Terminal] -->|HTTPS + Mutual TLS| B[Edge Gateway Cluster]

tech_stack.content: | **Database** | **PostgreSQL 15 + TimescaleDB** | Row-level security, native encryption at rest (pgcrypto), time-series audit log optimization | MySQL: Lacks built-in row-level security for multi-tenant branch isolation | JR/T 0171-2020 §6.4.3 (data minimization enforcement) |

core_modules: | Tier | Components | Location | Residency Requirement | Uptime SLA |

| **Kiosk Edge** | Embedded Linux (Yocto), Chromium Kiosk Mode, Local Policy Engine, SQLite Offline DB | Branch Workstation (x86_64) | On-premises only; no cloud sync of PII/biometrics | N/A (local) |
